title: Ayanami Raising Project Nintendo DS
wikitext:
[]: Ayanami Raising Project - Nintendo DS             Quote Post by ungenesis » Sat Jun 14, 2008 4:16 pm http://www.famitsu.com/game/coming/1215785_1407.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 14, 2008 5:02 pm Actually that's just THIS game http://evageeks.org/FGP/Ayanami_Raising_Project but released for the Nintendo DS.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 14, 2008 8:13 pm Yay, I can finally play it! =D

[]:             Quote Post by ungenesis » Sun Jun 15, 2008 10:41 pm Oops. Thanks for fixing the thread then :) . I did a search first but the only DS game I found was the Pucchi Eva game, sooo I figured this was new. Live and learn.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Jun 16, 2008 1:26 pm SIRP > RARP surp is greater than rarp.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sat Jul 05, 2008 5:41 pm Again? Gainax really DO want to cash in with this one...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jul 15, 2008 9:29 pm Whose that funky dude with the mustache in that one panel that Reis presumably interacting with? I really hope he';s not gonna try to get sexy with her!

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Sun Sep 07, 2008 12:13 am Any chance of a US release?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Sep 07, 2008 1:27 pm GVman wrote: Any chance of a US release?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Sep 07, 2008 3:23 pm This game along with an emulator has been uploaded to THAT BOARD. It's difficult to play on a computer but it has Rei in it, so that doesn't matter. Love overcomes all obstacles!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 08, 2008 3:25 pm Def: The guy with the mustache is some random character. Rei and Asuka are raised by san'i, mentioned in here: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Ayanami_Raising_Project I'll upload an image of him later today.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 08, 2008 7:16 pm Image here though it's from a 4koma it gives you a general idea of what he looks like: http://sente.tesuji.org/als_archive/ssd/0/1185413850865.jpg and here: http://sente.tesuji.org/als_archive/ssd/0/1185414109828.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed Sep 17, 2008 2:47 am Zuggy wrote: This game along with an emulator has been uploaded to THAT BOARD. It's difficult to play on a computer but it has Rei in it, so that doesn't matter. Love overcomes all obstacles!

[]:             Quote Post by Carrie » Tue Sep 23, 2008 1:57 pm I'm a huge dating sim/raising sim nerd, so it's no surprise that I imported this game last month almost immediately after it came out. I have to agree it's not nearly as good as the Shinji Ikari Raising Project (on multiple levels, which I won't bother going into unless someone out there really wants to hear.) but it still has a charm to it. I'm in the process of trying to compile all the information I've gathered about both raising projects - how they work, what the stats are, what triggers what event and how to get the various endings (of which I'm still in the process of finding out since I don't own the guides for either game ..yet..) I don't speak/read Japanese save a few bits and pieces, but I'm pretty handy with a dictionary and good at researching so while I can't translate the dialogue accurately (though I do have several scenes fully screencapped), I can at least give a general feel of what's going on. It was originally just going to be a resource for myself, but maybe I'll make a website out of it and it could be of some use to someone else out there.....I-if anyone is interested in that, I mean. (I feel like a dork getting excited about this haha.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 23, 2008 3:33 pm There's always putting the information on the Eva wiki: http://evageeks.org/FGP/ Oh, and there's some informative hints on game FAQs for the PS2 version of the Ayanami/Asuka game. I'd think it wouldn't be THAT different from the DS version.

[]:             Quote Post by IronChair » Wed Sep 24, 2008 4:51 pm Anyone have a link to an english or Japanese site with a good walkthrough for both Rei+Asuka? The one on gamefaqs is better than nothing, but only covers Rei and doesn't really go into much detail on obtaining the multiple endings.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 24, 2008 6:00 pm I'm trying to figure out that, myself.

[]:             Quote Post by IronChair » Fri Sep 26, 2008 6:45 pm Ah ok! I've only played through the game twice, once as Rei and once as Asuka. I managed a ' bad ' ending as Rei, but ended up breezing through and having a good ending with Asuka. This is my 3rd playthrough, second time with Rei, but yet i see myself going down a similar path despite having different priorities in stats. Oh well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 29, 2008 3:19 pm Interestingly enough the first time I played through Asuka's game I was able to have her be prevent Arael from attacking her too badly and she managed to defeat Armi in battle. The second time of her game was when I got the Eva-style ending. (Her getting depressed in episode 22, stuck in the hospital until the harpies attacked...) The only endings I've gotten for either girl is the school teacher Rei ending for Rei and the AU 26 Asuka wakes up Shinji for school ending. (What's weird is I got the Shinji ending even when Asuka falls for San'i.)

[]:             Quote Post by Victorthebattousai » Tue Sep 30, 2008 12:38 am What is this, the tenth port of it?! Anyway, I'd like to get the version for windows :/ Can't find it anywhere.
summary:
[]: Ayanami Raising Project - Nintendo DS             Quote Post by ungenesis » Sat Jun 14, 2008 4:16 pm http://www.famitsu.com/game/coming/1215785_1407.html
